category.scope_note: Motor power-tool comparison for China-exported products entering UAE regulatory routes (ECAS, EQM, EMC, safety, and product composition).

title.zh: 中国出口阿联酋电动工具合规比较
title.zht: 中國出口阿聯酋電動工具合規比較

description.en: Source-linked informational matrix on common gaps for Chinese power-tool exports into UAE market-access and technical-conformity flows, including ECAS/EQM, power/EMC baseline, noise, market registration, and battery-linked safety topics.
description.zh: 中国电动工具进入阿联酋的合规差距信息性对照矩阵，覆盖ECAS/EQM、用电与EMC、噪声、市场准入及电池相关安全要素，并附来源链接。
description.zht: 中國電動工具進入阿聯酋的合規差距資訊性對照矩陣，涵蓋ECAS/EQM、用電與EMC、噪聲、市場准入及電池相關安全要素，並附來源連結。

disclaimer.en: This is an informational comparison aid only. It is not legal advice, a certification decision, or an import permit. Requirements may change with MoIAT, customs, and federal/emirate notices. Verify final scopes with the current MoIAT ECAS/e-services and your UAE customs broker before shipment.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照，不构成法律意见、认证结论或通关许可。规则会随MoIAT、海关及联邦/酋长国公告更新，请在出货前以 MoIAT ECAS 与通关服务方最新要求为准。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照，不構成法律意見、認證結論或通關許可。規則會隨 MoIAT、海關及聯邦／酋長國公告更新，請在出貨前以 MoIAT ECAS 與通關服務方最新要求為準。

answer_first.en: Chinese exporters should not assume a China compliance packet is accepted as-is in UAE. Start from MoIAT (ESMA legacy) product scope, secure ECAS/EQM route for applicable categories, align voltage/frequency assumptions to UAE 230/400 V 50 Hz where applicable, and keep local representation and importer accountability documented in the UAE.
answer_first.zh: 出口商不能假定中国合规文件可直接等同于阿联酋要求。应首先确认MoIAT（原ESMA）管理范围，按分类完成ECAS或EQM流程，按阿联酋的230/400V 50Hz要求核对电源条件，并在通关文件中明确当地备案方和责任方。
answer_first.zht: 出口商不能假定中國合規文件可直接等同於阿聯酋要求。應先確認 MoIAT（原 ESMA）管理範圍，按品類完成 ECAS 或 EQM 流程，按阿聯酋 230/400V 50Hz 要求核對電源條件，並在通關文件中明確當地備案方和責任方。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update on official source changes; keep verified false unless source evidence is confirmed and date-matched.
